title: Public contract repository repositioning verification
scope: Verify that the public repository is shaped as a language-neutral contract repository after the migration.
preconditions: The migration changes are staged in the public repository checkout.
The sibling internal repository is available for implementation ownership context.
procedure: Scan the public repository for forbidden executable source and script extensions.
Scan the public repository for committed workflow automation and implementation build files.
Scan README and documentation for instructions that tell users to execute local build, runner, CLI, package publication, upload, or benchmark workflows from this repository.
Parse JSON contract and SpecTrace artifacts.
Confirm schemas, fixtures, scenarios, suites, load profiles, and governance documents remain present.
expected_result: The public repository contains contract and documentation artifacts only, with implementation/runtime ownership moved outside the public tree.
